title: Status plugin mappings (mappings.json)
description: Converts service-specific payloads into Status common objects (resources and events). Selector, condition, and template strings are opaque here; their grammar is defined in docs/16-mapping-language.md.

type.description: Resource type this mapping produces, e.g. app, repo, site.

request.description: Optional name of the request in requests.json whose responses this mapping applies to. When omitted, the mapping applies to every payload the trigger routes to it.

items.description: Optional selector for the array of items in the payload. Each item becomes one resource.

fields.description: Extra normalized fields, each a selector into the item payload.

actionUrl.description: Deep link into the source tool.

type.description: Event type emitted when this mapping matches. Must be declared in events.json.

request.description: Optional name of the request in requests.json whose responses this mapping applies to.

items.description: Optional selector for the array of items to evaluate.

when.description: Condition that must hold for the event to be emitted. When omitted, the event is emitted for every item.

severity.description: Severity for emitted events. Defaults to the event's defaultSeverity in events.json.

timestamp.description: Selector for the event timestamp. Defaults to the job time.

selector.description: Opaque selector expression. Grammar is defined in docs/16-mapping-language.md.

condition.description: Opaque condition expression. Grammar is defined in docs/16-mapping-language.md.

templateString.description: Opaque template string; {{...}} placeholder grammar is defined in docs/16-mapping-language.md.
